title: Caenopteris aspidioides
taxonomy: Caenopteris aspidioides belongs to the family Marantaceae, a group of flowering plants commonly known as the prayer plant family. This family is part of the order Zingiberales, which also includes other well-known plants like ginger and bananas. Within the Marantaceae family, Caenopteris aspidioides is classified as a genus within the tribe Maranteae. The Maranteae tribe is characterized by its unique leaf structure and growth habits. Caenopteris aspidioides is a tropical plant native to Southeast Asia.
